faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our chia seeds export

questions.q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
questions.a: MOQ depends on packaging type. Generally, we support bulk orders starting from 500kg. Contact us for custom requirements.

questions.q: Which countries do you export to?
questions.a: We export to multiple regions including UAE, Europe, USA and other international markets depending on buyer requirements.

questions.q: What certifications do your products have?
questions.a: We provide export documentation and certifications as required by the importing country. Details are available in the Certifications section.
We use food-grade packaging with options like 25kg, 50kg bulk bags and customized packaging as per buyer needs.
Payment terms depend on order size and destination. Usually we support advance payment, LC, or mutually agreed terms.
Shipping time varies by country and logistics mode. Typically 7–25 days depending on destination.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Our journey of excellence in chia seeds export

story.title: Our Story
story.desc: Dhanraj and Sons was founded with a vision to bring the finest quality chia seeds from Indian farms to global markets. With decades of experience in agricultural trade, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in chia seeds export.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To provide the highest quality chia seeds while maintaining sustainable farming practices and building lasting partnerships with our global clients.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To become the leading chia seeds exporter from India, recognized worldwide for quality, reliability, and ethical business practices.
